summary: test_force_transition_is_a_free_ungated_move (tests/core/test_workflow.py:340-345) drives a real force_transition on a real Task (WORKING -> PLAN, a non-declared backward edge) and asserts task.state == 'PLAN', the destination, distinct from the pre-move source state 'WORKING'; a violation that left state unset or wrong would fail this assertion. No mocks; force_transition/_enter run for real.
